task_description: Complete creative redesign of CACOYANNIS LIMITED website from generic agency template to Awwwards-level digital experience. Includes hero redesign, design showcase replacement, services/process enhancements, global design system updates, and final quality pass.

verification.summary: Production build generates all 11 pages successfully. Lint passes with zero errors. Semantic review identified 5 issues, 4 of which were fixed (rAF visibility gating, MagneticButton dead code removal, Process progress bar visibility scoping, ServiceCard animation conflict resolution). Issue 2 (word-reveal progressive enhancement) was accepted as a known limitation for this animation-heavy portfolio site.
